landing.hero_subtitle: Personal plan, 24/7 AI mentor, and progress analytics for ENT, IELTS, and university admissions
landing.features_subtitle: A comprehensive platform that adapts to you
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start free, upgrade to Premium when you're ready
landing.audience_ent_desc: Diagnostics, AI study plan, practice tests and mock exams
landing.problem_subtitle: And we have a solution for every problem
landing.problem_1: I don't know what career to choose
landing.solution_1: AI will identify your strengths and match you with a profession
landing.problem_2: I don't know how to prepare for ENT
landing.solution_2: A personalized study plan adapted just for you
landing.problem_3: My parents worry and I don't know what to do
landing.solution_3: Parents can see progress in real time
landing.showcase_subtitle: Three powerful tools that guide you from school to career
landing.showcase1_desc: An AI-powered test that adapts to your level in real time. Harder if you're doing well. Easier if you need to reinforce the basics.
landing.showcase1_feature1: Identifies strengths and weaknesses in 15 minutes
landing.showcase1_feature2: Adapts to your level — every question is tailored for you
landing.showcase2_desc: A personal assistant available 24/7. Ask anything — it will explain in simple terms and help you understand.
landing.showcase2_feature1: Explains any topic in simple language
landing.showcase2_ai_typing: Hi! I see you're struggling with logarithms. Let's break it down step by step?
landing.showcase3_desc: Not just ENT prep — we help you build a path from school to your dream career.
landing.showcase3_feature1: Career matching based on your interests and abilities
landing.showcase3_feature3: Step-by-step plan from now to employment
landing.labs_subtitle: Each Lab is a dedicated entry point for your specific goal
landing.lab_ent_desc: Diagnostics, personalized plan, theory and practice. Score 120+ points.
landing.lab_ielts_desc: Roadmap for all 4 skills, writing practice, university matching.
landing.lab_abroad_desc: AI will match universities, find scholarships and help with your motivation letter.
landing.lab_startup_desc: AI Co-Founder: roadmap from idea to investment + Kazakhstan accelerators.
landing.lab_career_desc: Skill Map, CV builder, public portfolio and internship database.
landing.lab_career_test_desc: 12 questions → your type + top 3 professions where you'll excel
landing.how_it_works_subtitle: A simple and clear path from the first step to results
landing.step1_desc: Tell us about yourself, your goals and interests in 5 minutes.
landing.step2_desc: AI will create a personalized ENT/IELTS study plan with theory and practice.
landing.step3_desc: Follow your plan with a personal AI assistant available 24/7.
landing.step4_desc: Ace the ENT and get accepted to your dream university.
landing.testimonials_subtitle: Real stories from students and their parents
landing.testimonial1_text: Raised my score from 67 to 89 in 2 months. The AI mentor explains better than a tutor — and is available anytime!
landing.testimonial2_text: I finally figured out what I want to be! The career navigator showed that IT is right for me, and now I have a clear plan.
landing.testimonial3_text: Now I see my child's progress every day. Finally at ease — I know the preparation is going according to plan.
landing.pricing_main_subtitle: Start for free, upgrade to a paid plan when you're ready
landing.pricing_free_desc: To get acquainted with the platform
landing.pricing_social_note: A <1>free extended access program</1> is available upon request
landing.social_program_desc: We believe quality education should be accessible. Apply and tell us why it matters to you — we'll review every application individually and confidentially.
landing.social_program_note: No certificates or documents needed. Just tell us about yourself.
landing.cta_subtitle: A free 15-minute diagnostic will show your level and create a personalized plan
landing.footer_description: An AI platform that guides students from school to their dream career. ENT preparation, career choice, university admissions.
landing.page_title: StudyHub — ENT, IELTS Preparation & Study Abroad
landing.page_description: AI platform for Kazakhstani students. Personalized ENT and IELTS study plans, weakness diagnostics, practice — free.
landing.pricing_social_note_plain: A free extended access program is available upon request

onboarding.welcome_subtitle: Study Hub will help you find your ideal career, build a path to your dream, and prepare for the future.
onboarding.about_subtitle: {{name}}, let's get to know you better
onboarding.interests_subtitle: Select all areas that attract you
onboarding.goals_subtitle: Select what's important to you now
onboarding.subjects_subtitle: Rate your level and mark subjects you want to study
onboarding.subjects_tip: Click the star to mark a subject for learning
onboarding.dream_title: Who do you dream of becoming?
onboarding.dream_subtitle: Type or choose from popular — can skip
onboarding.dream_optional_note: This is an optional step — you can just click 'Next'
onboarding.result_subtitle: Based on your interests and goals, we've found the best directions
onboarding.career_software-engineer_desc: Software development, web and mobile apps. High demand in Kazakhstan and abroad.
onboarding.career_data-science_desc: Data analysis, machine learning and AI. One of the most promising fields.
onboarding.career_ux-design_desc: Designing user interfaces and experiences. Creative work at the intersection of tech and design.
onboarding.career_medicine_desc: Treatment and disease prevention. A stable and respected profession with high social value.
onboarding.career_business-management_desc: Project management, strategic planning and entrepreneurship. A path to leadership.
onboarding.career_engineering_desc: Designing and building mechanisms, robots, and systems. The foundation of technological progress.
onboarding.career_law_desc: Legal system, advocacy and consulting. A prestigious profession with broad opportunities.
onboarding.career_finance_desc: Financial management, investments and analysis. A key role in any organization.
onboarding.career_cybersecurity_desc: Protecting information and digital systems. Growing demand worldwide.
onboarding.career_creative-arts_desc: Music, film, content creation, blogging. A world of creativity and self-expression.

pricing.kaspi_qr_hint: Scan QR in the Kaspi app
pricing.kaspi_auto_update: Status will update automatically after payment
pricing.kaspi_waiting_desc: Pay in the Kaspi app. Status will update automatically.
pricing.kaspi_error_desc: Payment was not processed. Please try again.
pricing.page_subtitle: Choose the plan that will take you to your dream. Cancel anytime.
pricing.feature1_desc: A personal tutor 24/7 who knows your weak spots and helps with exactly what you need.
pricing.feature2_desc: Parents see progress in real time. No surprises before the ENT.
pricing.feature3_desc: Full question bank for all ENT subjects with detailed explanations.
pricing.feature4_desc: See exactly which topics are dragging you down and how much time you need for each.
pricing.feature5_desc: Practice ENTs every week with error analysis and recommendations.
pricing.feature6_desc: If you follow the plan and see no improvement in 30 days — we'll refund you.
pricing.testimonial1_text: Thanks to Study Hub I knew exactly my weak spots and prepared strategically. Scored 128 on the ENT!
pricing.testimonial2_text: I finally see what my son is doing. The parent dashboard is exactly what every parent needs.
pricing.testimonial3_text: The AI mentor explains better than my tutor! And the study plan helped me organize my time.
pricing.faq1_a: Yes, at any time. No hidden terms.
pricing.faq2_q: How does the money-back guarantee work?
pricing.faq2_a: If you follow the plan for 30 days and see no improvement in test results — we'll refund the full amount.
pricing.faq3_q: Is the platform suitable for grades 9-10?
pricing.faq3_a: Yes! Starting early is the best strategy. We adapt the plan to your grade.
pricing.faq4_a: We accept Kaspi Pay — the most convenient method. Click 'Subscribe', scan the QR or open the link. Payment is instant and secure.
pricing.final_cta_subtitle: Every day without preparation is a missed opportunity. Don't wait — act.

support.value1_desc: We look at your ambitions and motivation, not just your financial situation.
support.value2_desc: Your application and story stay between us. We respect your privacy.
support.value3_desc: You will join a circle of motivated students who also strive for more.
support.value4_desc: Full platform access — the same tools as paid users. No limitations.
support.cat2: Children from rural and remote areas
support.hero_desc: Study Hub Support Program — free extended access for students who need it most. Apply and get the same opportunities as Premium users.
support.who_subtitle: If at least one description fits you — apply
support.form_subtitle: We read every application manually. Be honest — it helps us make the right decision.
support.submitted_desc: We received your application and will contact you on WhatsApp within 3 business days. Thank you for your trust!
support.placeholder_story: Tell us about your situation — why access to the platform matters to you...
support.placeholder_goals: Where do you want to study, who do you want to become...
support.privacy_note: All information is strictly confidential. We do not share data with third parties or use it for marketing purposes.
support.footer_note: Study Hub Support Program is an initiative by the Study Hub team. We believe every student deserves a chance. Places are limited.
